---
name: checkandcommit
description: In the current branch, run the formatting, linting, and testing suite, fix any issues, and generate a commit message that describes all changes that have not been committed yet.
---

In the current branch, run the formatting, linting, and testing suite, fix any issues, and generate a commit message that describes all changes that have not been committed yet. The commit message should follow the Conventional Commits format.

Use the makefile in the repository root to run the linting, formatting, and testing suite.
